note: Shared golden vector for the OpenComputer bundle fileset digest (flue-slice.md contract 4). The fileset digest over RAW file bytes MUST equal `digest` in all implementations: cmd/oc filesetdigest (Go), sessions-api skill-bundle-canonical.ts (computeFilesetDigestRaw), oc-runtimes adapter-core skills.ts. `mode` is decimal (0o644=420, 0o755=493). `contentBase64` is base64 of the RAW file bytes — the fileset INCLUDES a binary PNG (skills/triage/logo.png), so any impl that decodes to a utf8 string before hashing diverges (finding #13). `canonicalTarGzBase64` is a reference canonical tar.gz — gzip framing is implementation-specific and NOT a byte-level golden; use it only to verify parseTar(gunzip(x)) recomputes `digest`.
